sections.paragraph: f. consumption, destruction, Isa 10:25, from the root בָּלָה. Some MS. copies and printed editions have תַּכְלִיתָם, which may also have the sense of consumption, from כִּלָה Piel. But this reading appears however to arise from a copyist to whom תַּכְלִית was a more familiar word; compare a similar variety of reading, Job 21:13 36:11 .
